title: Chocolate Pancake Delight
description: A decadent breakfast treat featuring rich chocolate and fluffy pancakes
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and cocoa powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the pancakes warm with chopped chocolate chips on top and a sprinkle of romantic sprinkles, if desired.
